title: Get them talking
desc: Move the relationship off neutral by creating a real moment.
hint: Try something small and intentional in the Afterparty Apartment.

title: Build trust
desc: Establish a foundation of trust through consistent choices.
hint: Make choices that show respect and honesty.

title: Navigate conflict
desc: Handle disagreements without destroying the relationship.

title: The Phone Problem
desc: Decide whether to flip the phone or leave it.

title: The Coffee Table
desc: Explore the memories and secrets on the coffee table.

title: Couch Distance
desc: Navigate the physical and emotional space on the couch.

title: Late Night Conversation
desc: Have a meaningful conversation at the diner.

title: Laundry Room Tension
desc: Navigate the awkward intimacy of doing laundry together.

title: Karaoke Moment
desc: Decide whether to join them on stage or stay in the crowd.

title: Rooftop Truth
desc: Have a moment of honesty on the rooftop.

title: Road Trip Stop
desc: Make a meaningful choice during the gas station stop.
hint: Interact with the gas station environment.

title: Party Dynamics
desc: Navigate jealousy and social dynamics at the house party.

title: Rain Walk Intimacy
desc: Share a quiet moment during the rain walk.

title: Airport Goodbye
desc: Make a final choice before they leave.
hint: This is a turning point moment.

title: Hospital Waiting
desc: Be present during a difficult time.
